name: vanta_lab_orders
description: Send signed Vanta Diagnostics lab orders from Canvas to LKCareEvolve (ELLKAY) via Orders JSON v2.2. Pattern reusable for other ELLKAY-fronted labs.

handlers.description: On LAB_ORDER_COMMAND__POST_COMMIT, build ELLKAY Orders JSON v2.2 payload for the Vanta Diagnostics lab partner and POST it to LKCareEvolve.
